# Daily Flow Summary

The best day. Morning prep went smoothly — demo cluster healthy, presentation ready.

Paris Duke tried to pre-empt with his VC pitch, but Professor Lawrence kept the agenda on track. Juliet and I presented the Verona Platform. Live demo was flawless — 10K req/s, sub-millisecond latency. Even Tybalt admitted the quality.

Paris pushed back with his $50M VC offer, but Juliet's organic revenue projections were compelling. Professor Lawrence made the case for collaboration.

Both boards voted YES. We are co-leads. Mercutio was rehired as security lead. Even Tybalt came around.

This is just the beginning.
